goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 11:00' and should go to 'kings lynn'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode, address, and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 11:00 and should go to kings lynn
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
Make sure you get train ID
